description_long: This is an adult woman standing with arms slightly outstretched, dressed in casual urban attire. She wears a sleeveless, fitted top and a pair of rolled-up jeans, complemented by heeled shoes. Her right wrist is adorned with a stack of bracelets, adding a touch of style. The figure's hair is pulled back into a neat ponytail, and her facial features are clearly defined. The overall build is slender and athletic, with a confident, upright posture. The clothing and accessories suggest she is ready for a day in the city, blending comfort with a hint of fashion.
description: A casually dressed adult woman stands upright with arms out, wearing a sleeveless top, rolled jeans, heeled shoes, and bracelets, her hair in a ponytail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the ponytail, fitted top, bracelets, and the profile of the heeled shoes.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sleeveless top, open arm stance, facial features, and both bracelets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the ponytail, bracelets, and the side profile of the outfit.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the ponytail, back of the top, rolled jeans, and the stance of the legs and arms.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless top and rolled-up jeans with bracelets
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
